_comment: Operator-maintained source for Borough President + District Attorney + County Clerk (METRO_EXPANSION_PLAYBOOK 11.3). Fill each name from the official BP/DA site and set url to that official page, then run scripts/build_borough_officials.py. Leave a name null to omit it (the card then links to the NYC Green Book instead of naming anyone). NEVER guess a name - these are elected offices and a wrong name is a real error.
_verified: 2026-07-13 - each name confirmed on the office's own official site (Queens BP canonical queensbp.nyc.gov; SI DA statenislandda.org); BP set cross-checked against Wikipedia. Re-verify before/after each election cycle. | County Clerks verified 2026-07-20 on each office's nycourts.gov page: only Bronx and Kings publish the incumbent's name there; the other three entries carry office/link data only (a name is NEVER filled from memory or third-party sources). NYC County Clerks are APPOINTED (by the Appellate Division), so the card labels the row appointed.

clerk.address: 60 Centre Street, Room 161, New York, NY 10007
